data.description:
## What
Protocol steps 5-7 (docs/bash-migration.md §2) for Tier B, AFTER all leaf commands are ported + dual-run green. Flip the default in rebar._switch to python (one commit, switch stays as rollback). Soak one release dogfooding on this repo's own store: fsck clean, no PUSH_PENDING anomalies, no exit-code regressions, perf gates green. Then retire in one commit: delete REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, the bash ticket_* leaf functions + their heredocs in ticket-lib-api.sh, the dual-run wiring; translate each bash suite to pytest and delete the .sh suite.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Default flipped to python; switch retained one release as rollback
- [ ] Soak evidence linked (fsck/CI history) before retirement
- [ ] Retirement commit deletes switch + bash leaf functions + dual-run wiring together
- [ ] Each retired bash suite translated to pytest; ticket-lib-api.sh LOC drops
- [ ] Default-is-now-python (post-flip)
data.title: Tier B: flip REBAR_LEAF_WRITES default to python, soak, then retire switch+bash+suites
